targets.rawSql: SELECT bucket AS time, sum_value * 1.975 AS value, 'gas' AS metric FROM readings_1d r JOIN meters m ON m.id = r.meter_id WHERE r.tenant_id = '$tenant'::uuid AND m.meter_type = 'gas' AND bucket >= $__timeFrom() AND bucket < $__timeTo() ORDER BY 1

SELECT bucket AS time, sum_value * 0.250 AS value, 'electricity' AS metric FROM readings_1d r JOIN meters m ON m.id = r.meter_id WHERE r.tenant_id = '$tenant'::uuid AND m.meter_type IN ('electricity','electricity_3p') AND bucket >= $__timeFrom() AND bucket < $__timeTo() ORDER BY 1

SELECT bucket AS time, SUM(sum_value) * 0.250 / 1000 AS value, 'actual' AS metric FROM readings_1d WHERE tenant_id = '$tenant'::uuid AND bucket >= $__timeFrom() AND bucket < $__timeTo() GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY 1
SELECT generate_series($__timeFrom()::timestamptz, $__timeTo()::timestamptz, INTERVAL '1 day') AS time, 15 AS value, 'target' AS metric

SELECT SUM(sum_value * CASE WHEN m.meter_type IN ('electricity','electricity_3p') THEN 0.250 WHEN m.meter_type = 'gas' THEN 1.975 ELSE 0 END) / 1000 AS co2_tonnes FROM readings_1d r JOIN meters m ON m.id = r.meter_id WHERE r.tenant_id = '$tenant'::uuid AND bucket >= $__timeFrom() AND bucket < $__timeTo()

SELECT m.site AS metric, SUM(r.sum_value * CASE WHEN m.meter_type IN ('electricity','electricity_3p') THEN 0.250 WHEN m.meter_type = 'gas' THEN 1.975 ELSE 0 END) / 1000 AS value FROM readings_1d r JOIN meters m ON m.id = r.meter_id WHERE r.tenant_id = '$tenant'::uuid AND bucket >= $__timeFrom() AND bucket < $__timeTo() GROUP BY m.site ORDER BY value DESC
